possessionZoomPage.notice.content:
Possession rate on sales is an indicator measuring the compliance of stores with the theoretical assortment.
It represents the share of stores that sold a product reference compared to the number of stores that theoretically included the reference in their assortment.
For this possession rate on sales analysis, a product is considered held if at least one sale was recorded in the last 14 days of the analyzed period. More information about the possession rate on sales can be found in the documentation.
possessionZoomPage.notice.title: Possession rate on sales

scorecard.serviceRateDownstream.tooltip: Share of orders delivered on time to the stores by the warehouses. The net service rate takes into account the reprocessing done by the operational teams and is a ratio of quantities expressed in value. The gross service rate is a ratio of quantities of items.
scorecard.serviceRateUpstream.tooltip: Share of orders delivered on time by suppliers to the warehouses. The net service rate takes into account the reprocessing done by the operational teams and is a ratio of quantities expressed in value. The gross service rate is a ratio of quantities.
scorecard.stockWarehouse.tooltip: Stock value and quantity held in the warehouse. The stock value is always expressed excluding taxes. The stock quantity is expressed in sales units.
scorecard.weighdistUnavailable_barcode:
To display the weighted distribution, please select one product refrence and a monthly or weekly granularity.
Ratio between sales generated by the category for all stores selling the product and sales generated by the category for all stores.
scorecard.weighdistUnavailable_item_key:
To display the weighted distribution, please select one product refrence and a monthly or weekly granularity.
Ratio between sales generated by the category for all stores selling the product and sales generated by the category for all stores.
scorecard.weightedDistribution.tooltip:
Ratio between sales generated by the category for all stores selling the product and sales generated by the category for all stores. 
Available only when selecting one product reference and a monthly or weekly granularity.
scorecardPerformance.averageBasketAmount: Average value of purchases made by a non-cardholder customer per transaction.
scorecardPerformance.averagePrice.toolti: Sum of the sales amount divided by the sum of units sold.
scorecardPerformance.averageWeeklySalesA: Av. weekly sales (in sales w/o tax)
Av. weekly sales (in sales w/ tax)
scorecardPerformance.carrefourMarketShar: Ratio between the revenue generated by the supplier and the revenue generated by all suppliers in the product category/categories at Carrefour.
Ratio between the number of units sold by the supplier and the number of units sold by all suppliers on the product category/categories at Carrefour.
scorecardPerformance.nonavailable: This indicator will be available shortly.
scorecardPerformance.numberOfCardholders: Number of cardholders who have made at least one transaction within the scope.
scorecardPerformance.numberOfTransaction: Number of transactions completed by non-cardholder customers for the selected scope.
scorecardPerformance.salesValue.tooltip: Sales amount. Returns and discounts are included.
scorecardPerformance.stockStore.tooltip: Stock value and quantity held in the store. The stock value is always expressed excluding taxes. The stock quantity is expressed in sales units.
scorecardPerformance.stockTotal.notAvail: Not available for your permission level
scorecardPerformance.stockTotal.tooltip: Sum of store and warehouse stock. The stock value is always expressed excluding taxes. The stock quantity is expressed in sales units.
